title: Scaffolding Extension
description: Extend scaffolding beyond the normal limit of 7.
body:
## Scaffolding Extension [![Minecraft versions](https://cf.way2muchnoise.eu/versions/Minecraft_scaffolding-extension_all.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/scaffolding-extension/versions#all-versions) ![environment: server](https://img.shields.io/badge/environment-server-orangered) [![loader: Fabric](https://img.shields.io/badge/loader-Fabric-cdc4ae?logo=data:image/svg+xml;base64,)](https://fabricmc.net/) [![requires: Statement](https://img.shields.io/badge/requires-Statement-008200?logo=data:image/webp+xml;base64,)](https://modrinth.com/mod/statement/versions) [![supports: Mod Menu](https://img.shields.io/badge/supports-Mod_Menu-134bfe?logo=data:image/webp+xml;base64,UklGRlIAAABXRUJQVlA4TEUAAAAv/8F/AA9wpv9T/M///McDFLeNpKT/pg8WDv6jiej/BAz7v+bbAKDn9D9l4Es/T/9TBr708/Q/ZeBLP0//c7Xiqp7z/QEA)](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu/versions) [![license: MIT](https://img.shields.io/badge/license-MIT-white)](https://gitlab.com/supersaiyansubtlety/scaffolding_extension/-/blob/master/LICENSE) [![source on: GitLab](https://img.shields.io/badge/source%20on-GitLab-fc6e26?logo=gitlab)](https://gitlab.com/supersaiyansubtlety/scaffolding_extension) [![issues: GitLab](https://img.shields.io/gitlab/issues/open-raw/supersaiyansubtlety/scaffolding_extension?label=issues&logo=gitlab)](https://gitlab.com/supersaiyansubtlety/scaffolding_extension/-/issues) [![localized: Percentage](https://badges.crowdin.net/scaffolding-extension/localized.svg)](https://crwd.in/scaffolding-extension) [![Modrinth: Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/scaffolding-extension?logo=modrinth&label=Modrinth&color=00ae5d)](https://modrinth.com/mod/scaffolding-extension/versions) [![CurseForge: Downloads](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/564165?logo=curseforge&label=CurseForge&color=f16437)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/scaffolding-extension/files) [![chat: Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1006391289006280746?logo=discord&color=5964f3)](https://discord.gg/xABmPngXAH)
--- ### Extend scaffolding beyond the normal limit of 7. Works server-side and in single player. Scaffolding Extension adds a single gamerule, `scaffolding_extension:limit`. This allows you to configure how far scaffolding can reach without support. Set the value like you would any other gamerule, using the command `/gamerule scaffolding_extension:limit` followed by a value between 1 and 63. The default value is 32. ---
Translating [![localized: Percentage](https://badges.crowdin.net/scaffolding-extension/localized.svg)](https://crwd.in/scaffolding-extension) If you'd like to help translate Scaffolding Extension, you can do so on [Crowdin](https://crwd.in/scaffolding-extension).
---
Credits - [Virtuoel](https://github.com/Virtuoel/) for making [Statement](https://modrinth.com/mod/statement) and helping me use it to make this mod. - [gliscowo](https://github.com/gliscowo) for making [Isometric Renders](https://modrinth.com/mod/isometric-renders), which I used to create the mod icon.
--- This mod is only for Fabric (works on Quilt, too!) and I won't be porting it to Forge. The license is MIT, however, so anyone else is free to port it. I'd appreciate links back to this page if you port or otherwise modify this project, but links aren't required.
